articles.author: Minyvonne Burke
articles.title: What we know about the University of Alabama student found dead at Barcelona beach during trip - NBC News
articles.description: The death of an American student whose body was found in the water at a Barcelona beach days after he was reported missing remains a mystery as police say foul play is not believed to be involved.
articles.content:
The death of an American student whose body was found in the water at a Barcelona beach days after he was reported missing remains a mystery as police say foul play is not believed to be involved.
